title: yadm Bootstrap Improvement
description: Implement improved yadm bootstrap: create Setup-Dotfiles.ps1, rewrite .yadm/bootstrap, expand tool list, update docs

stories.title: Create Scripts/Setup-Dotfiles.ps1
stories.description: Canonical setup implementation with all 5 phases
acceptanceCriteria: File exists at Scripts/Setup-Dotfiles.ps1 — PASS (10375 bytes)
Phase 1 sets execution policy RemoteSigned -Scope CurrentUser non-interactively — PASS
Phase 2 installs tools via winget silently; treats exit codes 0 and -1978335189 as success — PASS
Phase 3 Deploy-Config helper uses SHA256 hash comparison; skips if identical — PASS
Phase 3 deploys PowerShell profile and Windows Terminal settings — PASS
Phase 3 deploys BleachBit cleaners/*.xml files — PASS
Phase 3 emits [SKIP] warnings for TBD configs without failing — PASS
Phase 4 adds Scripts dir to PATH without any Read-Host prompt — PASS
No Read-Host calls anywhere in the script — PASS
Script handles missing winget gracefully — PASS (prints install URL)

stories.title: Rewrite .yadm/bootstrap as thin wrapper
stories.description: Replace 165-line implementation with a wrapper that delegates to Setup-Dotfiles.ps1
acceptanceCriteria: File .yadm/bootstrap is a thin wrapper (under 20 lines) — PASS (418 bytes, 15 lines)
Bootstrap calls Setup-Dotfiles.ps1 using @args pass-through — PASS
Bootstrap exits non-zero with descriptive error if Setup-Dotfiles.ps1 not found — PASS
yadm bootstrap -- -WhatIf correctly passes -WhatIf to Setup-Dotfiles.ps1 — PASS (@args pass-through)

stories.title: Update AGENTS.md Bootstrap Process section
stories.description: Update documentation to reflect new one-command setup with -WhatIf preview
acceptanceCriteria: AGENTS.md Bootstrap Process section shows yadm bootstrap and yadm bootstrap -- -WhatIf — PASS
AGENTS.md no longer references allow-scripts.cmd as manual post-bootstrap step — PASS
